title: FOR POTATO DEVICES
description: FOR POTATO DEVICES 🥔 – A lightweight modpack that makes Minecraft smooth and playable on low-end PCs.
body:
# Summary # 
A lightweight Minecraft modpack designed for players on low-end PCs and laptops who still want high FPS, faster loading, and smooth gameplay without losing important features.
**Currently available for Minecraft 1.21.4.**

## ✨ Key Features:

- 🔧 Performance Boosts with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton, and ModernFix working together.
- 👀 Visual Improvements via Dynamic Lights, Enhanced Block Entities, and More Culling without killing your FPS.
- 🎮 Quality of Life Tweaks like Mouse Tweaks, Better Third Person, Let Me Despawn, and Clumps.
- ⚡ Lightweight & Stable, perfect for older hardware and potato devices.

## 📌 Perfect for players who: ## 
- Want a vanilla-friendly survival with 2–5x more FPS.
- Need a smooth and stable experience on multiplayer.
- Own a so-called “potato PC” 🥔 but refuse to give up on Minecraft.
- 🚀 The result: Minecraft that feels smooth, fast, and fun even on the lowest-end machines.

## ✅ Credits
